burn(uint256).notice: Burn gUSD from caller's own balance.

burnFrom(address,uint256).notice: Burn gUSD from `from`. Only callable by authorized burners.         Consumes allowance unless burner is the `from` address itself.

mint(address,uint256).notice: Mint gUSD to `to`. Only callable by authorized minters.

documentation.text: @notice Mint gUSD to `to`. Only callable by authorized minters.
@notice Burn gUSD from caller's own balance.

@notice Burn gUSD from `from`. Only callable by authorized burners.
         Consumes allowance unless burner is the `from` address itself.
